title: CORS Explained in Plain English
abstract: CORS Explained in Plain English may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms. HN discus...
abstract_zh: 这可不是普通的工具，它叫“CORS白话解释器”，专治你在前端开发中遇到的跨域烦恼。别看它低调，一出手就是精准打击，让你瞬间从HTTP错误的沼泽中脱身。在这个AI大行其道的时代，它简直就像是深夜食堂里的小厨神，默默无闻但实力max！
